full_text: Jan Frylinck to Fakhar Zaman, Caught by Zane Green!! A stunner from the keeper! He was initially going to his right, and was left wrong-footed when the edge was found. But his reflexes compensate for the position he got himself in. Dives across, sticks out a left-hand and the ball sticks right in the webbing between thumb and forefinger. Back of a length close to off, the stock-pace delivery from Frylinck and it skids through sharply to cramp Zaman.
